overall.description: Nighttime driving through a wet suburban palm-tree lined street in GTA V. The vehicle navigates a gentle right curve on rain-slicked asphalt illuminated by streetlights, passing a parked sedan and central median with tropical landscaping.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban arterial road with central median

events.description: passing a parked dark sedan on the left side of the road
beginning a gentle right turn at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: driving forward on wet suburban road, approaching a right-hand curve with steady speed

notable_agents.action: dark sedan parked on the left shoulder, being passed by ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street against the night sky
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
illuminated street light casting light on the wet road surface
street light visible through the palm trees on the right
raised concrete median with bushes and small plants dividing the road
dark colored sedan parked on the left side of the street
headlights from a vehicle visible at the distant intersection

segments.scene_description: Driving straight along a wet suburban road at night, illuminated by streetlights. Palm trees line both sides of the street while a central median with landscaping divides the road. A dark sedan is parked on the left shoulder and is passed midway through the segment as the vehicle approaches a right curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved residential street with retaining walls

events.description: entering the right curve, shifting view from straight ahead to the right side of the road
residential houses and stone retaining walls become visible on the right and left sides respectively

agents.ego_description: navigating a gentle right-hand curve on the wet road, maintaining steady vehicle speed

entered.detail: modern suburban house with illuminated windows visible on the right side of the curve
low stone wall running along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Continuing through a right-hand curve on the wet suburban road. The central median shifts to the left side of the frame as the vehicle turns. A modern suburban house becomes visible on the right, while a stone retaining wall appears on the left. The palm trees remain prominent along the roadside as the curve progresses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-slicked suburban street that transitions from a straight path into a sweeping right-hand curve. It begins by moving straight under the glow of streetlights, passing palm trees and a landscaped central median while gliding past a dark sedan parked on the left shoulder. As the vehicle approaches the bend, the road begins to curve right, causing the central median to shift toward the left side of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal a modern suburban house on the right and a stone retaining wall on the left, all while the prominent palm trees continue to line the roadside through the turn.
